title: Reflect Projectiles
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Allows an entity to reflect projectiles.

azimuth_angle.title: Azimuth Angle
azimuth_angle.description:
[EXPERIMENTAL] A Molang expression defining the angle in degrees to add to the projectile's y axis rotation.

Sample values:
• breeze: 180.0 + Math.random(-20.0, 20.0)

elevation_angle.title: Elevation Angle
elevation_angle.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] A Molang expression defining the angle in degrees to add to the projectile's x axis rotation.

reflected_projectiles.title: Reflected Projectiles
reflected_projectiles.description:
[EXPERIMENTAL] An array of strings defining the types of projectiles that are reflected when they hit the entity.

Sample values:
• breeze: ["xp_bottle","thrown_trident","shulker_bullet",...

reflection_scale.title: Reflection Scale
reflection_scale.description:
[EXPERIMENTAL] A Molang expression defining the velocity scaling of the reflected projectile. Values below 1 decrease the projectile's velocity, and values above 1 increase it.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.5

reflection_sound.title: Reflection Sound
reflection_sound.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] A string defining the name of the sound event to be played when a projectile is reflected. "reflect" unless specified.
